Requirement: Two part system
Bluetooth Setup Module
Bluetooth Car Module Mode 1: Demo
Bluetooth Car Module Mode 2: Free Drive
UART1 used to communicate with HC-05 Bluetooth module
UART0 used to communicate with PC terminal and MCU
Set HC-05 to Command Mode
On start up displays the Initial Set up message in PC terminal
After boot up, loop and wait for user to enter a command in terminal
Sends entered user command to set up HC-05

Returns the HC-05 response to the PC terminal and display on PC 
terminal: user input command and response
Set up HC-05 Name
Set up HC-05 Pass
Set up HC-05 UART
Set up HC-05 Role
HC-05 will be set up in Data Mode
UART1 used to communicate with HC-05 Bluetooth module
Communicate to Car with a smartphone/PC via Bluetooth
Initally boots in Mode 1
SW1 to toggle between modes 1 and 2
Use Hardware PWM0 to drive motors on Romi Chassis
Upon entering Mode 1 LED = Green
Mode 1: Send command from Bluetooth Terminal to MCU to drive car in designated routes:
Mode 1: '8' - Draws one figure 8 and stops
Mode 1: 'C' - Draw one circle and stops
Mode 1: 'S' - Draw one square and stops
Mode 1: 'Z' - Draw a zigzag with 4 segments and stop
Upon entering Mode 2 LED = Blue
Mode 2: Send a command from Bluetooth Terminal to MCU to drive car:
Mode 2: 'F' - Moves car forward
Mode 2: 'B' - Moves car backward
Mode 2: 'L' - Moves car in left wide turn
Mode 2: 'R' - Moves car in right wide turn
Mode 2: 'S' - Stops car
Mode 2: 'U' - Speeds car up
Mode 2: 'D' - Slows car down
Default Baud Rate for Command Mode: 38400
Default Baud Rate for Data Communication Mode: 9600
UART1 must be used to communicate with HC-05
In setup module, HC-05 must be in Command mode
In setup module, PC Terminal must be used to send AT coommands to HC-05
In setup module, UART0 must be used to communicate with MCU to PC
In setup module, invalid commands receive error response
In setup module, Dont set HC-05 name to CECS447
In setup module, Dont set HC-05 pass to 1234
In car module, HC-05 must be in Data mode
In car module, Must use Hardware PWM
In car module, Communicate to Car with a smartphone/PC via Bluetooth
In car module, invalid inputs are not accepted
